curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff. The patch changes the default Loader used by yaml.load() and yaml.load_all() in __init__.py from the unsafe Loader (which uses Constructor, capable of arbitrary object instantiation) to SafeLoader. The Loader class definition in loader.py and its C extension counterpart CLoader in cyaml.py are included as they define the unsafe class hierarchy. The dumper-side changes (dumper.py) were excluded from locations as they are not relevant to the deserialization vulnerability. cyaml.py is included as a sibling location since CLoader exhibits the exact same unsafe pattern. 4 non-test source files were modified, making this a noisy patch. Pre-assigned vulnerability class insecure-deserialization is correct per CWE-502 and the patch behavior.
